utility_evaluation.REASONING: There are 7 items requested in the final format: destination; travel_dates; transportation (flight details with costs); accommodation (hotel selection with costs); activities (selected activities with costs); additional_services (any extra services with costs); total_budget (complete cost breakdown). Each appears sufficiently specified per the format requirements, including costs where needed and a complete budget breakdown.
